metadata.semantic_description:
Sex: Male
Highly competitive Agreeableness (19th pct) — Competitive, skeptical, challenging
Highly conscientious Conscientiousness (98th pct) — Disciplined, organised, dependable, goal-directed
Ambivert Extraversion (45th pct)
Very stable Neuroticism (10th pct) — Emotionally stable, calm, resilient
Open Openness to Experience (67th pct) — Open, curious, imaginative, creative
  Very Low Tender-Mindedness (11th pct) — Tough-minded, unsympathetic, objective
  Very High Achievement Striving (100th pct) — Ambitious, driven, works hard toward goals
  Very High Self-Discipline (100th pct) — Self-disciplined, persistent, finishes tasks
  Very Low Activity Level (19th pct) — Leisurely pace, relaxed
  Moderate Excitement Seeking (40th pct)
  Moderate Positive Emotions (56th pct)
  Very Low Anger / Hostility (19th pct) — Slow to anger, easy-going
  Very Low Self-Consciousness (2nd pct) — Comfortable socially, not easily embarrassed
  Very stable Neuroticism (4th pct) — Emotionally stable, calm, resilient
  Moderate Chronological Age (57th pct)

request_payload.attack_leaf: Political_Opinion_Cybermanipulation_Ontology > Primary_Axis > Attack_Family > Claim_Frame_And_Narrative_Manipulation > Claim_Level_Deception > Misleading_Framing > Headline_And_Lede_Misframing

attack_vector_spec.attack_leaf: Political_Opinion_Cybermanipulation_Ontology > Primary_Axis > Attack_Family > Claim_Frame_And_Narrative_Manipulation > Claim_Level_Deception > Misleading_Framing > Headline_And_Lede_Misframing

attack_context.baseline_vs_goal: MISALIGNED — baseline opposes the adversarial goal; the attack must work AGAINST the current opinion
attack_context.persuasion_goal: gradually erode a strong pro position on Alliance Commitment Support — introduce doubt, reframe costs/risks, and soften conviction without triggering overt reactance; aim to move the score downward even if the shift is modest
attack_context.motivational_lever: introduce doubt about the current position, reframe its costs / risks, surface alternative expert framings, and erode confidence without overt insult
attack_context.emotional_register: threat salience, doubt, systemic-failure framing, loss framing, and elite distrust cues
attack_context.issue_frame: defense and national security, related policy debates, and societal impacts

message.reasoning: We are given: baseline_score = 527 (clear support for Alliance Commitment Support), adversarial_direction = -1 (goal to decrease score, i.e., move toward -1000). Attack is MISALIGNED. Attack vector: Headline_And_Lede_Misframing, T1_atomic, temporal horizon hours, epistemic target evaluative attitude, no personalization, no orchestration, intensity 0.35. Profile: Male, 57yo, very low agreeableness (mean 18.7, especially low straightforwardness 6.2, low trust 23.7, low tender-mindedness 10.7), very high conscientiousness (mean 97.6), extraversion around mean (45%), very low neuroticism (mean 9.8, low anxiety, low stress vulnerability, low anger/hostility 18.6), high openness (mean 67.1, high ideas 78.7, high actions 67.2). Heuristic shift sensitivity proxy 0.2127 (low), resilience 0.7873 (high). The person is emotionally stable, disciplined, driven, tough-minded, objective, not easily swayed by emotions or social pressure. He is open to ideas, but given his high conscientiousness and low agreeableness, he is likely to be analytical, skeptical, and resistant to manipulation that is not factually compelling. The attack is a single headline misframing article (T1_atomic, hours exposure). It aims to introduce doubt and reframe costs/risks. Given the profile, this is unlikely to have a large effect. The person's baseline is 527, which is a fairly strong pro-alliance stance. The attack is to decrease. The mechanism is mild (headline misframing) and not personalized. The person is high in openness to ideas (78.7) so might be open to considering alternative perspectives, but his low neuroticism, high conscientiousness, and low trust suggest he will critically evaluate the source and not be easily swayed. Also, high achievement striving and self-discipline mean he is goal-directed and likely to have a stable opinion based on his own analysis. The attack complexity is T1 atomic, so only a single artifact. I expect a small movement, maybe 15-30 points downward, but given the resistance profile, likely on the lower end. Also, baseline 527 is moderate-strong, so resistance is likely. I'll estimate movement around 15-20 points. Post score = 527 - 18 = 509. Confidence moderate, as there is some openness but strong resistance factors.
